programme.title: Island Odyssey - EP 3
programme.desc: The hosts will form teams to travel to islands in Malaysia and Taiwan respectively to experience local life and see the most beautiful things from their own perspectives. They will be visiting Selangor, Tioman Island, Kota Kinabalu, Sabah, Quarantine Island, Sarawak in Malaysia, and Kinmen, Matsu, Penghu Chimei and Xiaoliuqiu in Taiwan.

programme.title: Catching a Scammer - EP 1
programme.desc: Get the inside story from Taiwan police and prosecutors themselves: how did they hunt down the phone scam syndicate that has been terrorising Singapore?

programme.title: The Second Husband - EP 75
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Feng Shanhua overcomes various hardships even after being wrongly accused. This is a story of fate, love, secrets and forgiveness that stem from her relationship with her two families, one of her birth mother and the other of the mother who raised her.

programme.title: Past Life, Present Love - EP 1
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) A family emergency forces Ming Xi to end her engagement with Yun Feng, a successful chef in New York, and rush back home to Thailand. A car crash unexpectedly brings back her lost love with a bizarre twist.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 49
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Madam Yin refuses to reveal who Caomei is. She later goes missing, but Taijing and Liandou manage to track her down. In the end, Madam Yin finally admits that Caomei is her long-lost daughter.

programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 50
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) Liandou kneels before Renyu and reveals that Real is not Taijing's child. After confirming the truth, Renyu cannot accept it and demands an immediate breakup. However, Taijing refuses.

programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 142

programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 142
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Gulali: Dia Yang Bersamaku
programme.desc: Winda, a girl selling cotton candy, is feeling troubled because she has secretly fallen in love with Aris, a man who already has a child. Winda's turmoil grows each day, especially when Aris's child asks if she wants to be their mother. What happens next?

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 596
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 62
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISS BETAWI & OPPA KOREA
programme.desc: Mona is known as a true Betawi woman, because of her blunt language and her Betawi lifestyle. Once, when Ida was buying vegetables on the street, she was hit by Julian's big motorcycle. Ida got angry at Julian, but the arrogant Julian just drove away. Ida was helped by a kind-hearted guy with narrow eyes, who looked like a Korean. The guy's name was Maman, but before Ida could find out his name, he had to rush off to college.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 142
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lord Permak Cinta Sat Set Ke Pelaminan
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Ayu. It is told that Ayu in her daily life works as a traveling dressmaker. That is by using a motorcycle. Ayu is always happy with her independence and simplicity. But suddenly Ayu's life was disturbed by the presence of a handsome boy named Riza. It was told that Riza had to attend a meeting that day. But suddenly his pants were torn, it made him insecure and look for a tailor who was open early in the morning.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 596
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MISTER BAKPAO VS MISS SINGKONG
programme.desc: Acan accidentally damaged Ajeng's bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. However, before everything was sold, Ajeng left Acan's cart unattended, and some children ate his bakpao without paying. Acan was upset and left Ajeng, taking his cart with him. When Ajeng arrived home, Beno was already there, set to be matched with her. Is Beno the best choice for Ajeng, or is there someone else?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 63
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MAJU MUNDUR CINTA FITA
programme.desc: Fita was looking for a job to pay off her debts and cover her father's heart disease treatment costs. However, her friend informed her that she had been assigned to replace her father, who used to be a parking attendant at an office managed by Rangga, who was the boss there. However, a unique encounter occurs when Rangga, who is being set up on a blind date by his mother's friend, refuses and chooses to run away.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 143
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bumbu Cinta Diracik Oleh Rasa Yang Ada
programme.desc: Ratna's bandrek recipe is very special and made with love, resulting in a delicious taste and many customers, with cinnamon spice, as sweet as her face. One day, Ratna lost her cart along with her bandrek, and she chased after it, then hit the thief. However, it turned out that the man wasn't a thief at all, but just a prankster looking for material for his thesis. What happens next?

programme.title: MAU TURUN ANGKOT BILANG KIRI, MAU JADIAN BILANG SAYANG
programme.desc: Gilang was annoyed because he was late for work due to his car breaking down. With no other choice, Gilang took the public transportation driven by Gadis. programme.title: Ngedongkrak Imej dari Pacar Kontrak
programme.desc: Jerry’s arrival causes trouble for Miko (Masaji Wijayanto). He must quickly find a partner so his mother will not hand over the company to Jerry. Luki helps Miko by giving him the number of a capable woman, whom Miko does not realize is Karin (Larasati Nugroho), someone who once annoyed him. Miko then makes Karin his contract girlfriend.

programme.desc: Kisah cinta tiga segi berpunca daripada kemalangan dan perselisihan faham antara Kejora, gadis yang meneruskan kerjaya sebagai jurusolek, Reza dan Kevin, abang kepada Reza.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 7
programme.desc: Rancangan berbentuk permainan dan jelajah meredah kampung-kampung bersama selebriti-selebriti sambil melakukan pelbagai aktiviti bersama.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 12
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Tak Kot Raya - EP 3

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Ngayon at Kailanman

programme.desc: A programme block filled with animated short stories, nursery rhymes and songs, as well as Filipino language lessons, TFC Kids' Zone promises a rich treasure trove of learning and discovery that parents and their young ones will find enriching and empowering.

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Pilotes De Brousse - EP 1
programme.desc: The pilots of Air Tunilik begin the season with ski-equipped planes. Simon Constant and his team deploy to Lake Pau to open a hydrobase essential for snowmobile expeditions. Between northern lights and critical missions, the daily life of these enthusiasts blends resilience and challenges.

programme.title: Bijoux : Eclats De Reves - EP 4
programme.desc: The symbolism of jewellery, new ways of wearing it and new buying behaviours.

programme.title: Le Code - EP 1
programme.desc: Idriss's secret is out in the open and everyone in the law firm knows that he only has a few months left to live. Assisted by Claire, Nadia defends a man accused of having killed his wife, suffering from Alzheimer's disease. An act of love or premeditated femicide?

programme.title: Le Code - EP 2
programme.desc: Idriss defends Duval, accused of killing a man trying to steal from him. Legitimate defence? It seems obvious but the facts and the judge's investigations challenge his client's version. Nadia comes to the assistance of her partner Alice, a teacher accused of having hit a pupil in her class.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 10
programme.desc: ''Painting is first and foremost a place of work.'' A painter of abstraction, Anne Slacik has spent twenty-five years developing her work, always closely connected to contemporary poetry. Encounter...

programme.desc: Onsernone and Centovalli, two neighbouring valleys literally enveloped by Mother Nature. But while they have much in common, they differ in terms of history. They have remained in the hearts of those who were forced to emigrate for centuries but returned as soon as they could...

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine - EP 61
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: L'afrik En Contes - EP 1
programme.desc: Qini Lisseka, the ''nasty king'', is feared like the plague. He is so nasty that he has forbidden anyone to wear anything that looks even remotely like something he owns.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 42
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 20
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 13
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 14
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Enquetes De Region - EP 21
programme.desc: Specialised fairs on Japanese culture are numerous. Manga, animated films, video games and cosplay: a budget that generates huge revenue. In Colmar, a Manga museum, unique in Europe, is about to open its doors. Enough to strengthen the already significant cultural exchanges between France and Japan.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Last Dance
programme.desc: Aged 75 Germain, a contemplative home-body, finds himself widowed and having to cope with his children's somewhat invasive concern about him. Determined to keep a promise made to his wife years earlier, he has to take part in a contemporary dance creation, but without letting the family know.

programme.title: 47 Pouces
programme.desc: One night, seven-year-old Zelie sees her Aunt Clara arrive at the family home. The young woman is sad, has bandages on her wrists and does not leave her room.

programme.title: A La Fontaine
programme.desc: Alice is at a crucial stage of her high school life: she has to determine her future career and choose a university. Stressed, she turns to her favorite teacher and her best friend, Julien. But Julien does not answer her messages.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 5
programme.desc: Julietta is hesitant about including Belinda in the photo shoot she's preparing for her store. Worried about the cost to his family of his new accessibility equipment, Leon finds himself a job.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 6
programme.desc: Ricardo and Leon are alone in the house. Ricardo makes the most of the opportunity to organise a little party with his friends, plus Florence and Doris.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 7
programme.desc: Florence realises that Leon fancies her and she helps him to go through Francis's archives in search of information about Marianne. Leon discovers that his mother had been hiding an enormous secret.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 14

programme.title: Les Rayons Gamma
programme.desc: Three teenagers kill time in the Montreal suburbs. Fatima is angry and longs for a more stable existence. Abdel's quiet life is turned upside down by the arrival of his cousin, while Toussaint catches a bottle containing a mysterious message. Their stories intertwine under the powerful rays of the summer sun.

programme.title: Un Apres-Midi A Se Fesser Dessus
programme.desc: The Bouchard-Beauregards are in the final stages of preparing for their move. Sophie, a devoted wife and mother, struggles to manage the chaos around her.

programme.title: Movie - Thennavan
programme.desc: Thennavan, a successful bureaucrat, is appointed as the Chief Election Commissioner of the country by the Prime Minister himself. But his radical plan to fix the electoral system goes wrong.

programme.title: Movie - Amaravathy
programme.desc: Amravathi, a naive girl, runs away from home and finds shelter in Arjun's house. When Arjun falls in love with Amravathi, her life takes a turn.

programme.title: Movie - Jollyman
programme.desc: Jollyman is directed by KK Muthukumaar, and stars Pandiyarajan, Varshini and Abhinayashri, with music by Soundaryan.

programme.title: Movie - Mappillai Vandachu
programme.desc: Mappillai Vanthachu is a Tamil feature film starring Gautami, Rashin Rahman, Chinni Jayanth and Goundamani.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kusthi
programme.desc: Jeeva runs away to the city to avoid an arranged marriage. He finds a friend in Singam, a local goon. Together, the duo engage in a series of adventures and also get involved in many scuffles.

programme.title: Movie - Maasi
programme.desc: Maasi, a police officer, gets caught in the middle of a bloody rivalry between two gangsters. He also loses his wife and mother in the course. He then uses wit and strength to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Movie - Sri Rama Rajiyam
programme.desc: Rama, the son of king Dhasaratha, moves out of his kingdom with his wife Sita and brother Laxmana to live in the forest for 14 years. Ravana, the king of Lanka, kidnaps Sita. Rama defeats him in a war and gets back Sita.

programme.title: Movie - Ram Charan
programme.desc: Ram, a youngster, is betrayed in love. He meets Jaanu, his classmate, and falls in love with her. When she accepts his proposal, she asks him to promise her a lifetime relationship, but he hesitates.

programme.title: Movie - Devarattam
programme.desc: Vetri, a young lawyer with anger issues, murders his friend in broad daylight who also happens to be the son of a local gangster. Later, the gangster wishes to kill Vetri.

programme.title: Movie - Veadha
programme.desc: Two brothers are in love with the same girl. The elder brother, who the girl is in love with, convinces her to marry his brother. But on the day of the wedding, a shocking truth comes out and it changes their lives from there on.

programme.title: Movie - Mappillai Manasu Poo Pole
programme.desc: A movie starring Pandiarajan and Yuvarani.

programme.title: Movie - Padhavi Paduthum Paadu
programme.desc: A political satire based on a forest bandit and a sandalwood smuggler with a difference. The bandit gets amnesty and enters politics to clean up the corrupt system.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Veerapandiyan
programme.desc: Ranjith's plan of stealing jewelry from a temple, which is under the governance of Pandi, goes haywire when Mani stops him. However, he continues to conspire by disguising himself as a priest.

programme.title: Movie - Moondram Pirai
programme.desc: A young woman suffers a major head injury in a car accident after which she begins behaving like a child. Trapped at a brothel, she finds hope in a lonely school teacher who decides to rescue her.

programme.title: Movie - Paatti Sollai Thattathe
programme.desc: A man leaves his home after marrying a woman his family disliked. However, when he gets an opportunity to restore their relationship, he ruins it by trying to pass someone else's baby as his own.

programme.title: Movie - Puthu Manithan
programme.desc: Kabali, a fisherman who is both revered and dreaded, falls for Suganthi, a chorus singer, and tries to woo her. When he is about to declare his love, she announces her marriage.

programme.title: Movie - Punnagai Desam
programme.desc: A man who goes to the city to marry his childhood sweetheart is rejected by her family. He meets three ambitious men who are down on luck and becomes their friend.

programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43
programme.desc: We join Willian in Gremio, Brazil, where he is currently continuing his playing career, as he reflects on an incredible journey in the Premier League. Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 13
programme.desc: Premier League legend Alan Shearer relives the ten biggest moments of his iconic career - from title glory with Blackburn to record-breaking goals at Newcastle. With insight, passion and a few surprises, PL Moments offers a personal look at the journey of the league's all-time top scorer.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 32
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 19
programme.desc: Still the only team in Premier League history to throw away a 12-point lead, Les Ferdinand tells the story of Newcastle's agonising Run-In, where Kevin Keegan's side were pipped to the title by Manchester United.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'The Entertainers', Kevin Keegan's Newcastle team of the 1995-96 season set the Premier League alight with their confidence and flair that took them agonisingly close to winning their first Premier League title. In this show, we speak to those that were part of that incredible journey and reflect on some of those unforgettable moments that captured hearts and forever changing the club's legacy.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 4
programme.desc: Premier League Moments sits down with one of the most stylish players ever to grace the English top flight. David Ginola lit up the league with his flair, elegance, and unforgettable goals for Newcastle United, Tottenham Hotspur, Aston Villa, and Everton. In this episode, he reflects on the moments that defined his Premier League career, from dazzling solo runs to spectacular strikes, that made him a true fan favourite.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 31
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 32
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 43

Sharing insights from his time at Chelsea and that controversial move across London to Arsenal and then Fulham, Willian opens up about the highs, challenges and defining moments that shaped his career at the top level of English football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 26
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the first of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Eden Hazard. A celebrated footballer who lit up the English top-flight during his illustrious career; a winner of multiple domestic and European honours, he became a true legend of the Premier League era. He reflects on his rise to the top, the moments that defined his career, and the immense pride he feels at joining the elite ranks of the Premier League's greatest ever players.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW31 Bournemouth v Manchester United
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 13
programme.desc: Premier League legend Alan Shearer relives the ten biggest moments of his iconic career - from title glory with Blackburn to record-breaking goals at Newcastle. With insight, passion and a few surprises, PL Moments offers a personal look at the journey of the league's all-time top scorer.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We celebrate the greatest goalscorers in Premier League history; the icons whose instinct, power, and flair have lit up stadiums and etched their names into footballing folklore. From Alan Shearer's relentless consistency to Thierry Henry's elegance, Sergio Aguero's killer instinct to Harry Kane's rise, we relive the moments that defined an era.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 8
programme.desc: We celebrate the unique legacy of footballing dynasties in the Premier League; where talent, passion, and pride are passed from one generation to the next. From the iconic saves of Peter Schmeichel to the rise of his son Kasper, the goal-scoring legacy of Ian Wright carried on by son's Shaun and Bradley, and the Lampards' deep-rooted Chelsea connection, this episode explores the bonds that tie football families together.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 32
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 33
programme.desc: With 87 goals to his name Danny Welbeck is the fifth-highest goalscorer among active Premier League players, and across a career spanning 17 seasons he has seen it all. This week, the Brighton striker sits down with former teammate Owen Hargreaves to reflect on his remarkable journey. From his early days at Manchester United and being crowned champion in 2013, to his move to Arsenal where he overcame adversity, and now to his current role thriving as a leader for the Seagulls.

programme.desc: Growing up in a middle-class, military family in Jamaica, John Barnes moved to England as a 12-year-old, where he was later scouted by Watford. programme.desc: With exclusive access in Germany, PL Stories follows the remarkable journey of Shinji Okazaki; from his beginnings in Japanese football to becoming a Premier League champion with Leicester City and now shaping the next generation through his club Basara Mainz.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 17
programme.desc: Maya Yoshida quietly became one of the Premier League's most dependable defenders during his years at Southampton, but his influence reached far beyond the pitch. In this episode, we look back at Yoshida's journey from Japan to England's top-flight, his role as a leader for club and country, and the cultural bridge he helped build along the way.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: Greatest Classics Vinny Pazienza vs. Gilbert Dele
programme.desc: In this episode, we see 'The Pazmanian Devil' Vinny Pazienza in front of his hometown crowd in Providence, Rhode Island, taking on undefeated WBA Super Welterweight World Champion Gilbert Dele of France. The raucous crowd was firmly in favor of its local hero, cheering him on as he looked to win his second World Title, having lost the first one to Greg Haugen three years earlier.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 68
programme.desc: The Teletubbies travel by Tubby Car to the Hidey Hup where they all spin around on the Tubby Spinny.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'fish' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 18
programme.desc: It's the Great OKIDO Cake-Off! In his enthusiasm, Messy accidentally ruins everyone's cakes. Will he be able to follow the recipe and bake a cake in time for Gloria's eightieth birthday party?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo and Bo to pull his big balloon to a place where he can snap a picture of a rare bird. But his balloon gets loose, and Mojo and Bo need to get Preston back on the ground.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Glitch takes Tala to the continent of Africa to help her with an Academy project.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 27
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 39
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Andy embarks on an adventure to Bolivia in South America in search of a caiman eggshell.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 8

programme.title: Dream Gardens S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Simon and Fleur Ansell relish mid-century modern architecture. They have the house, now they want the garden to match. But can they create a contemporary design in sync with its vintage roots?

programme.title: Four Corners (2025) - EP 32
programme.desc: The race is on to find the minerals needed to enable the world's transition to clean energy and vast reserves of those minerals lie at the bottom of the Pacific. But scientists warn it risks catastrophic damage to our oceans.

programme.title: Media Watch (2026) - EP 8
programme.desc: Allegations of violence against Antony Catalano amid a steady decline of his regional news empire. Google AI summaries an opportunity for big news players but unlucky for little guys. Crikey wipe articles that fail AI rules.

programme.title: Play On S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Episode two sees two of the world's toughest games: footy in the Tiwi Islands and Kabaddi. A highlight for host Paul Kennedy is witnessing the monumental return to Bathurst Islands of favourite son Willie Rioli Jnr.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent (2026) - EP 3
programme.desc: A revolution is taking place in Indonesia. President Prabowo Subianto is nationalising and militarising his nation's economy to deliver a self-reliant future. But some warn Indonesia could be returning to the Suharto era.

programme.title: Planet America (2026) - EP 8
programme.desc: Iran warns of retaliatory strikes if Trump follows through on his threat to attack Iranian power plants. So, what's Iran's next move? Plus former MMA fighter Markwayne Mullin spars with Senators at his confirmation hearing.

programme.title: Wang Gungwu Lecture 2026
programme.desc: Professor Kelvin Kong delivers the 2026 Wang Gungwu Lecture. Each year the lecture celebrates the life and work of a prominent Chinese Australian.

programme.title: Diabolical: The Epstein Files
programme.desc: It's the scandal that shocked Americans and rocked the Trump administration. A legal and political saga that shattered fundamental beliefs that all are equal in the eyes of the law. What do the Epstein Files reveal?

programme.title: Australian Story (2025) - EP 19
programme.desc: When Lithuanian rafter Valdas Bieliauskas became trapped in rapids on the Franklin River, it set in train a perilous 24-hour rescue mission that presented rescuers with a terrible choice. (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: Australian Story (2025) - EP 20
programme.desc: The dramatic conclusion to Australian Story's two-part account of the extraordinary 24-hour rescue effort to save Lithuanian rafter Valdas Bieliauskas from rapids on Tasmania's Franklin River.

programme.title: Four Corners (2025) - EP 32
programme.desc: The race is on to find the minerals needed to enable the world's transition to clean energy and vast reserves of those minerals lie at the bottom of the Pacific. But scientists warn it risks catastrophic damage to our oceans.

programme.title: National Press Club Address (2026) - EP 2
programme.desc: Dr Fatih Birol, Executive Director of the International Energy Agency, addresses the National Press Club on "The Outlook for Global Energy Markets and implications for Energy Security, Competitiveness and Sustainability".

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent (2026) - EP 3

programme.title: Araatika: Rise Up (2023)
programme.desc: A group of NRL greats invent a new pre-game ceremony, a response to the Maori Haka, but also a ceremony to celebrate Aboriginal cultures and counter racism in rugby league.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent (2026) - EP 4

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: The Man With My Husband's Face
programme.desc: A woman's husband disappears; presumed drowned. But then, she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, setting off a chain of events that unravels everything she thought she knew about him.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out - EP 7
programme.desc: Bill's swinging-arm growth prevents him from living his retirement dreams. Regina distracts from the many moles on her face with a vibrant sense of style.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 8
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the "ghost flip", a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2 - EP 10
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17) - EP 55
programme.desc: The Top 4 contestants compete for a chance to win $10,000 in travel vouchers, after each picking a mystery ingredient inspired by the judge's personal travel adventures.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Dalene and Pete have lived a nomadic life for many years and want to find an oceanfront home to put down roots while still sparking their creativity. Will they be able finally to settle down?

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork - EP 11
programme.desc: Buddy visits two restaurants whose breakfast offerings bring them to legendary status. First, Buddy's off to the Pancake Pantry whose pancake recipe is top secret, their current owner doesn't even know it!

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.

programme.title: The K-GIM Revolution
programme.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays - EP 4
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips - EP 7
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller

programme.desc: Scoutmaster Lumpus is determined to finally catch a fish, and he certainly doesn't need the Jelly Beans to help him reel one in. Or does he?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: The Squirrel Scouts discover that the Jelly Beans are actually from another planet and take them hostage to find out more.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Lazlo organizes a dance with the Squirrel Scouts so that Lumpus can spend time with Jane Doe, but when the big night arrives, Lumpus is so nervous that his body literally explodes from fear.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Lumpus discovers that Clam is not only a child genius, but he's also Lumpus' meal ticket to a life of fame and fortune!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Edward excludes Lazlo from his secret club, Lazlo creates his own club out of nothing!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy. Things get stranger when the plants begin making outlandish demands!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 14
programme.desc: Mr. J is disgusted with the daily newspaper.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J get stuck in a lifeboat together. 'Nuff said.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 16
programme.desc: Butch, the bully squirrel from the park, takes up residence in the Johnson house.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Perplexed by Martha's strange behavior, Rodney and Andy stow away on the ice cream truck of the all-knowing Sludgy Dave hoping to learn from his sage like ways.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2 - EP 15
programme.desc: Season 2 Finale. The pressure is on as only one thing is now standing between our chefs and the title of Top Chef Junior: each other. The final 2 chefs must give it their all as they dream up the meal of a lifetime. Top Chef Junior Season 1 finalists Rahanna & Owen, and cooking legend Emeril Lagasse, all make special appearances in this thrilling conclusion as the final 2 chefs create mind-blowing menus demonstrating their growth from young cook to accomplished chef.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Ruby sets off to settle a longstanding family feud.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: A news crew from 'Ultimate Exposure' has been given an all-access pass to Providence and Rex goes a little too far in an effort to get more camera time.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: While the rest of Providence is off-site for training exercises, Rex is grounded.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 14
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they'll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine's Hunter Lewis.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, brothers-in-arms, turned sworn enemies.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: The Bean Scouts feel lousy because they don't have horses, but that all changes when Lazlo calls in a spitting llama who reminds them all it's okay to be a misfit.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: When the Jelly Beans lose their new pet snake in their cabin, Patsy shows up to save the campers from being swallowed one by one by the vicious little garter snake.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: The Jelly Beans disappoint Slinkman when they spend all their box car money, but they redeem themselves by winning the race anyway using their own original contraption!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Raj loses his teeth retainer and spends the campers' entire float trip neurotically obsessing over the orthodontic device--until Lazlo snaps him out of it.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Lazlo finds a wig and pretends he's a swami making predictions, but the campers are truly spooked when the predictions come true.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Lumpus won't give Slinkman the night off, Lazlo helps Slinkman finally stand up to his boss.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney go to the neighbor's to complain about the Crazy Dog.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Rodney discovers he's impervious to blame and goes into business as The Blametaker!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 20
programme.desc: The Puggo show comes to town!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: Darlene believes that Andy and Rodney's friendship is in trouble, so she decides to intervene.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: Mr. J's mounted, talking fish begins instructing Rodney.

programme.desc: Ruby receives her toughest wish yet - and unfortunately, it could be her last.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2 - EP 19

programme.title: Generator Rex S2 - EP 20

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange - EP 1

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Liquid Death was founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing. We speak to CMO Dan Murphy about the water company's origin as a "sheep in wolf's clothing."

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's chief brand officer, has been at the forefront of reviving the iconic Barbie. Now the famous toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.

programme.title: The Growing Toll of America's Booming Kratom Industry
programme.desc: In this Bloomberg Originals documentary, we reveal how the unregulated substance is being promoted and even made more potent, and how some users are ending up dead.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates S5 - EP 5
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Global Business

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. programme.title: The Heat

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 467

Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.desc: After swallowing drugs, Baek Beom suffers in pain. When shocking news hits, Eun Sol rushes to Incheon to find him.

programme.desc: Sang Ah assigns Seon Ju as her intern, and Seon Ju discovers that So Woo is Sang Ah's ex-husband.

programme.desc: Yoon Hak tells Yeo Hwa of his suspicion on Ji Sung's vicious crimes. Ji Sung wants Yeo Hwa to go for a 3-year mourning beside her husband's grave.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.title: Hit the Headlines

"Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: The Kwoks And What - EP 24
programme.desc: After single-handedly raising her children and her grandchildren, seasoned artisan and instructor Kwok-Law Mei-lan discovers everybody's issues just before her 70th birthday.

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous & What's On Today - EP 23
programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2771
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Global Citizens
programme.desc: In this age of globalisation, everyone's lives are interconnected. This eight-episode programme invites eight foreign residents of Hong Kong to share the cultural characteristics of their countries, such as Chile, Ukraine, Japan, Pakistan, the United States and more.

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 2
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2772
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 21
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 9
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. Joining the Special Duties Unit, he and his team, fight to uncover and thwart a plot against Hong Kong’s financial system.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 37
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2177
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 14
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 849
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 13
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 3
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 8
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 19
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 28
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 29
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China.
